claims.summary: Tail vibrancy should use a smooth bounded entropy gate.
claims.disposition: Verified smoothstep and boundary regressions, including exact-gate and 0.84/0.86 behavior.

claims.summary: High-entropy tail headroom should remain distinguishable from the default feature clamp.
claims.disposition: Verified tail-only ceiling lift, overflow evidence, and bounded TAIL_VIBRANCY_MAX behavior.

claims.summary: Vibrancy must not overwrite narrative arc or reserved shadow dimensions.
claims.disposition: Verified exact parity tests assert dimensions 40 through 47 remain unchanged by vibrancy.

claims.summary: Bright but empty or scattered vibrancy should remain mechanically distinguishable.
claims.disposition: Verified vibrancy-substance-fit and gradient-aware noise-dampening evidence.

claims.summary: FEATURE_ABS_MAX should become dynamic from resonance density.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 codec gain and transport change requiring explicit Mike/operator approval.
